name: starshot
description: Rust Cloudflare Worker and macOS uploader for screenshot links.

scripts.config:check: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock load -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env; else varlock load -p .env.schema; fi'
scripts.agent: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- bin/starshot agent "$@"; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- bin/starshot agent "$@"; fi' --
scripts.list: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- bin/starshot list "$@"; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- bin/starshot list "$@"; fi' --
scripts.sync: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- bin/starshot sync "$@"; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- bin/starshot sync "$@"; fi' --
scripts.upload: sh -c 'if [ -f .varlock/profiles/starshot.env ]; then varlock run -p .env.schema -p .varlock/profiles/starshot.env -- scripts/upload-latest-screenshot.sh; else varlock run -p .env.schema -- scripts/upload-latest-screenshot.sh; fi'
